description: A deterministic habit loop for autonomous agents, enabling trigger-action-reward cycles without human involvement.

trigger.description: Condition or event that initiates the habit loop.

action.description: The behavior the agent performs when the trigger occurs.

reward.description: Reinforcement signal used to strengthen or weaken the habit.

adjustment_rules.description: Rules for modifying the habit loop over time.

workflow.action: Agent monitors for the trigger condition.
Agent performs the associated action deterministically.
Reward signal is applied to reinforce or weaken the loop.
Habit loop is modified according to adjustment rules.
Protocol returns a machine-readable habit loop summary.
